Notes: UWO ranked 10th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO's Selner scores 11
points and grabs 10 rebounds for second double-double of season...UWP makes
just one 3-point shot in 22 attempts and turns the basketball over 21 times,
14 more than UWO...UWO led 15-2 after the first quarter.
Game.Officials: Matt Andrews,  Joel Stieber,  Jodi Duffe
